541.name: ADX14_3St (cc14_541.py)
541.description: ADX directional regime switcher on QQQ that routes between leveraged Nasdaq, a large-cap basket, and T-bills. Uses ADX with +DI/-DI direction to classify the market into bull, neutral, or bear, then sizes accordingly.
541.overfit_notes: Single ADX(14) indicator with canonical ADX>25 strength threshold; non-canonical part is the three-bucket regime mapping and TQQQ/BIL execution choice

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: ADX(14) > 25 classifies as trending; otherwise neutral

rules.label: Entry (trend)
rules.text: ADX > 25 AND +DI > -DI: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry (neutral)
rules.text: ADX ≤ 25: equal-weight top-5 large-caps

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: ADX > 25 AND -DI > +DI: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 fundamental large-caps / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Top 100 by dollar volume, then top 5 by market cap (refreshed via coarse/fine)

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

rules.label: Rebalance

545.name: ADX14_DILvl (cc14_545.py)
545.description: Directional regime switcher driven by the absolute level of +DI/-DI rather than ADX strength plus direction. Routes to leveraged Nasdaq when bullish DI dominates, to T-bills when bearish DI dominates, and to a large-cap basket otherwise.
